instruction: The disabled lightning bolt is cut off at the edges. Restore the full visible icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 80" width="96" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="96" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bolt-slash.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M11.412 15.655 9.75 21.75l3.745-4.012M9.257 13.5H3.75l2.659-2.849m2.048-2.194L14.25 2.25 12 10.5h8.25l-4.707 5.043M8.457 8.457 3 3m5.457 5.457 7.086 7.086m0 0L21 21"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bolt-slash.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M11.412 15.655 9.75 21.75l3.745-4.012M9.257 13.5H3.75l2.659-2.849m2.048-2.194L14.25 2.25 12 10.5h8.25l-4.707 5.043M8.457 8.457 3 3m5.457 5.457 7.086 7.086m0 0L21 21"/></g>
